# matomo_tagmanager_trigger_scrollreach (Resource)

Triggered as soon as the user scrolls to a certain position.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "matomo" {}

resource "matomo_site" "example" {
  name = "Example ScrollReach Site"
  urls = ["https://example-scrollreach.example.com"]
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_container" "example" {
  site_id = matomo_site.example.id
  context = "web"
  name    = "Example ScrollReach Container"
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_trigger_scrollreach" "example" {
  container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.example.id
  name         = "example-scrollreach"
  scroll_type = "horizontalpercentage"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container_id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `scroll_type` (String)

### Optional

- `percentage` (Number) You can specify any number between 1 and 100. If you specify 50, then it means the element needs to be at least 50% visible depending on the scroll match type.
- `pixels` (Number) The amount in pixels that needs to be visible of this element depending on the selected scroll match type.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
